DP.022.0000:
We try to think like a Trainer when
we develop new Pokétch apps.\f
The user’s satisfaction is what
we’re after.
DP.022.0001:
Pokémon Watch!
That’s Pokétch for short.\f
Say it the long way and...
What does Pokémon stand for again?\f
Anyway, I’m the father of the
president of the Pokétch Company!
